drwxr-xr-x 1 root root     106 Mar  9 02:43 app

-rwxr-xr-x 1 root root    2688 Mar  9 02:44 test.sh

#!/bin/sh
# Test for field regression between v1 and v2 API.
# v2 should be a superset of v1 — all v1 fields must exist in v2 responses.

set -e

FAIL=0
PORT=18085

# Rebuild
cd /app/app && go build -o /app/server . 2>&1
cd /app

# Start server
PORT=$PORT ./server &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 1

if ! kill -0 $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "FAIL: Server failed to start"
